ashes.description: A low-value residue item associated with spent fires and other firemaking output.
ashes.acquisition: The export links ashes to Firemaking economy data, but it does not expose the exact production step, so this remains a conservative fire-related byproduct entry.
ashes.uses: No major downstream crafting use is exported, so it mainly functions as a minor economy item.

coins.description: Standard currency used across shop, trade, and value calculations.
coins.acquisition: The export does not expose a single primary source, so treat coins as general-purpose currency earned through broader gameplay systems.
coins.uses: Used to buy items from merchants and to represent value across the project economy.

feathers_bundle.description: A bundled feather resource used to finish headless arrow recipes in Fletching.
feathers_bundle.acquisition: Sold by the Fletching Supplier in the exported fletching economy tables.
feathers_bundle.uses: Combined with shafts across each wood tier to produce headless arrows for later arrow assembly.

hammer.description: A core workshop tool used throughout smithing and metal assembly recipes.
hammer.acquisition: Sold by Borin Ironvein through the exported smithing merchant tables in Starter Town and North Road Camp.
hammer.uses: Required for many smithing tasks and it also appears as a trade item in the smithing economy.

knife.description: A cutting tool used across fletching and simple crafting workflows.
knife.acquisition: Stocked by general stores in Starter Town and North Road Camp, with the exported default stock listing ten at a time.
knife.uses: Used to shape logs and related materials in fletching workflows, and it also appears in the fletching economy tables.

soft_clay.description: A worked clay resource kept as a conservative crafting-material entry.
soft_clay.acquisition: No direct recipe or gathering source is exported for soft clay, so its acquisition remains intentionally sparse.
soft_clay.uses: The export does not show strong downstream links, so it is described as general crafting stock rather than tied to unconfirmed recipes.

tinderbox.description: A basic firemaking tool used to ignite logs.
tinderbox.acquisition: Stocked by general stores in Starter Town and North Road Camp through the exported firemaking and general-store economy data.
tinderbox.uses: Used to light logs for Firemaking.
